stearnsWharfNotes: Wind and dirty water slowed pier fishing. Surfperch still available but larger game fish reports weak. Conditions likely poor for several days before gradual improvement midweek.
goletaNotes: Strong wind and swell likely reduce pier comfort and water clarity. No meaningful local halibut or baitfish momentum reported.
why: Strong northwest wind and swell expected to worsen nearshore conditions
Dirty water and upwelling likely reduce bait visibility and fish activity
Only consistent reports were smaller surf species while legal halibut and seabass reports were weak
sourceNote: Manually distilled from a subscribed Southern California fishing report.
